# PaperSpine-Inspired Design Notes

This package borrows high-level workflow lessons from PaperSpine while remaining a separate, field-agnostic first-paper-building skill.

Reusable design lessons:

- use an orchestrator skill plus branch skills;
- do not begin with prose polishing;
- force motivation or research-spine confirmation before drafting;
- separate exemplar learning from citation support;
- produce an audit trail instead of only a final manuscript;
- use a writing rationale matrix as the draft execution plan;
- audit the result before declaring completion.

Deliberate differences:

- this package is not tied to target scene configuration;
- this package is not centered on manuscript rewriting;
- this package focuses on brainstorming and constructing a first paper from scratch;
- this package avoids rank-label language and field-specific assumptions;
- the default final artifact is a first draft plus research trail, not a typeset final submission package.
